es.example: A veces prefiero quedarme en casa.
es.exampleTranslation: Sometimes I prefer to stay home.

it.example: A volte preferisco stare a casa.

bridge.note: Italian counts occasions in turns (volte — cognate with Spanish vuelta, not vez), Spanish in veces. The same deep split as c'era una volta / había una vez, now in its everyday clothes. Cross-reference 0029.

interference.es_to_it: The volta/vez split again (see 0029): occasions are TURNS in Italian. 'A vece' is not Italian — in vece drifted off to become invece.
interference.it_to_es: 'A vueltas' means something else entirely (struggling with something, Spain). Times are veces.

review.notes: From Joe's Italian teacher's prepositions crash course, 2026-07-16. ES pairing chosen by Claude, unverified — reviewer to confirm.
